news.t: VanEck Launches TruSector ETFs to Deliver the Exposure Sector Funds Miss

holdings.infoBox: TRUD is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street® CnsmrDiscSelSectSPDR®ETF stock at 51.88%, Amazon.com at 26.25%, Tesla at 8.96%, The Home Depot at 2.55%, and McDonald's at 1.35%.

overview.description: The VanEck Consumer Discretionary TruSector ETF (TRUD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks long-term capital appreciation by investing in individual US consumer discretionary-related stocks and broad consumer discretionary sector ETFs. The fund seeks to provide consumer discretionary sector exposure without capping restrictions. TRUD was launched on Aug 20, 2025 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Launches TruSector ETFs to Deliver the Exposure Sector Funds Miss
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches TruSector ETFs, designed to deliver full market-cap sector exposure and greater precision for allocators.
